objects.name: Analytic 1826
objects.description: Defender observes an app enabling or using input-capture surfaces (custom keyboard extension with Full Access, abnormal UI text entry interception, pasteboard polling adjacent to login screens), then persisting and/or exfiltrating captured input. Chain: capability/consent (TCC for keyboard Full Access or input privacy domains) → intercept behavior (keyboard extension active, repeated text field ‘editingChanged’/secure entry focus, background pasteboard reads) → local write → near-term egress.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Keyboard extension Full Access change; privacy grant touching input/keyboard categories for <bundle_id>

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: UIWindow/UIView events indicating secure text entry focus, editingChanged bursts, unexpected firstResponder cycling

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: CREATE/WRITE clipboard/keylog artifacts (clipboard.db, keys_*.txt) in container

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Max time from intercept to persist/exfil (e.g., 5–60s).
Minimum key/commit or editingChanged count to flag harvesting (e.g., ≥10).
Require keyboard Full Access to escalate severity (true/false).
Foreground state, Focus modes, MDM policy.
